rate.source: HDFC Rewards Points Program Terms and Conditions PDF (hdfc.bank.in), retrieved 2026-07-19

multiplier.source: SmartBuy public page (offers.smartbuy.hdfc.bank.in), retrieved 2026-07-19 — general page, not Infinia-login-specific

monthly_cap_points.source: HDFC Rewards Points Program Terms and Conditions PDF (hdfc.bank.in), retrieved 2026-07-19

accelerated.notes: 5X SmartBuy flights; cap shared across all SmartBuy earning (smartbuy_total)

multiplier.source: SmartBuy public page (offers.smartbuy.hdfc.bank.in), retrieved 2026-07-19 — general page, not Infinia-login-specific

monthly_cap_points.source: HDFC Rewards Points Program Terms and Conditions PDF (hdfc.bank.in), retrieved 2026-07-19

accelerated.notes: 10X SmartBuy hotels; cap shared across all SmartBuy earning (smartbuy_total)

multiplier.source: CardExpress review (cardexpress.in/reviews/hdfc-infinia) + prior convergent sources (SmartBuy public page, HDFC T&C PDF, product-owner confirmation)

monthly_cap_points.source: HDFC Rewards Points Program Terms and Conditions PDF (hdfc.bank.in), retrieved 2026-07-19

accelerated.notes: Voucher/Gyftr cap (effective 2026-07-01) is a subset of smartbuy_total, not additional; engine applies the entry cap only. History: HDFC announced a 5X-to-3X devaluation in January 2026 and reversed it on January 14, 2026; current stable rate is 5X (16.5%). Resolves the earlier flagged conflict — both prior reports were accurate at different points in time.

caps.notes: Redemption cap (points redeemable as cashback per month), not an earn cap

voucher.source: Three independent sources agreeing (Paisabazaar, CardMaven, 1Finance). Exception: Apple Products and Tanishq vouchers redeem at the INR 1.00 travel rate, not the standard voucher rate; per-brand rates not modeled.

travel.source: Four independent sources agreeing, including CardExpress's explicit redemption table

fees.notes: Annual fee is INR 12,500 + GST; INR 10 lakh annual spend waives the renewal fee

annual_spend_inr.source: Multiple independent news reports (Feb 2026) + CardExpress + product owner direct confirmation, 2026-07-19

relationship_value_inr.source: Multiple independent news reports (Feb 2026) + CardExpress + product owner direct confirmation, 2026-07-19

continuation_eligibility.notes: INR 18 lakh annual spend OR INR 50 lakh Relationship Value (average balance across savings/current/FD/RD) required to retain the card from April 2027; existing holders protected until March 2027
